channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Patriots' Stefon Diggs pleads not guilty to assault allegation
item.description: New England Patriots wide receiver Stefon Diggs has pleaded not guilty to a felony strangulation charge and a misdemeanor assault and battery charge s...

item.title: Journalist Don Lemon set to be arraigned in Minnesota church protest case
item.description: Former CNN host Don Lemon and four other people are set to be arraigned on federal civil rights charges in Minnesota, accused in a protest at a church...

item.title: Judge sentences teen to life without parole for fatally shooting 5 in North Carolina
item.description: A judge has sentenced a mass shooter to life in prison without parole for killing five people in 2022 when he was 15

item.title: Brazilian au pair gets 10-year sentence for scheme to kill lover's wife, another man
item.description: A Brazilian au pair got the maximum 10-year sentence after confessing to scheming with her lover to kill his wife and another man

item.title: San Francisco teachers, district reach deal after first strike in decades
item.description: San Francisco teachers who have been on strike over wages and family health benefits have reached a tentative agreement with the school district
